_setup_instructions.findings_json_path: Path to findings.json from threat-model (preferred input, default: findings.json in project root)
_setup_instructions.findings_csv_path: Path to a Codex security findings CSV (alternative input)
_setup_instructions.threat_model_path: Path to THREAT-MODEL.md for cross-referencing (default: THREAT-MODEL.md in project root)
_setup_instructions.commit_patches: Whether to create git commits for each patch (default: false — just apply edits)
_setup_instructions.branch_prefix: Prefix for security fix branches when committing (default: security/)
